channel.title: GitHub Apex Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Apex in GitHub

item.title: jongpie/NebulaLogger
item.description: The most robust logger for Salesforce. Works with Apex, Lightning Components, Flow, Process Builder & Integrations. Designed for Salesforce admins, developers & architects.

item.title: certinia/apex-mdapi
item.description: Apex Wrapper for the Salesforce Metadata API
